title: Grammica californica
taxonomy: Grammica californica is classified as a species within the genus Grammica, which falls under the family Apidae, commonly known as the sweat bees. This family is part of the order Hymenoptera, which also includes ants, bees, and wasps. The order Hymenoptera is further divided into two main suborders: Symphyta and Apocrita. Grammica californica is a type of bee native to the western United States, particularly in California. The classification of Grammica californica is based on its morphology, behavior, and genetic characteristics.
